mapper.select:
# CompanyMapper.selectCompanyList SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , C.business_no , C.id_placeholder , C.pw_type , C.no_use , C.use_noti_talk , C.ci_filename , C.ci_filename AS org_ci_filename , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CC.employee_number , CC.family_number , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end , CC.sales_manager , CC.assist_manager , CC.notes , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay , CCT.type_self , CCT.type_family , CCT.type_copay , CM.account , CM.contract , CM.result , CASE CM.result WHEN 1 THEN CM.company_manager_name END AS result_manager_name , CASE CM.result WHEN 1 THEN CM.email END AS result_manager_email , CASE CM.result WHEN 1 THEN CM.telephone END AS result_manager_telephone , CASE CM.result WHEN 1 THEN CM.mobile END AS result_manager_mobile , CASE CM.contract WHEN 1 THEN CM.company_manager_name END AS contract_manager_name , CASE CM.contract WHEN 1 THEN CM.email END AS contract_manager_email , CASE CM.contract WHEN 1 THEN CM.telephone END AS contract_manager_telephone , CASE CM.contract WHEN 1 THEN CM.mobile END AS contract_manager_mobile , CASE CM.account WHEN 1 THEN CM.company_manager_name END AS account_manager_name , CASE CM.account WHEN 1 THEN CM.email END AS account_manager_email , CASE CM.account WHEN 1 THEN CM.telephone END AS account_manager_telephone , CASE CM.account WHEN 1 THEN CM.mobile END AS account_manager_mobile , CM.user_id FROM company C
JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear} LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN company_manager CM ON C.company_id = CM.company_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND CC.deleted_at IS NULL AND CM.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CC.checkup_year DESC, C.company_name

# CompanyMapper.selectCompany SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , C.business_no , C.id_placeholder , C.pw_type , C.no_use , C.use_noti_talk , C.ci_filename , C.ci_filename AS org_ci_filename , C.account_user_id , C.sales_user_id , C.admin_user_id , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CC.employee_number , CC.family_number , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end , CC.expected_total_support_pay , CC.expected_total_platform_pay , CC.expected_total_etc_pay , CC.sales_manager , CC.assist_manager , CC.notes , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay , CCT.type_self , CCT.type_family , CCT.type_copay FROM company C
LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{companyCheckup.checkupYear} LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON PM.user_id = C.admin_user_id OR PM.user_id = C.sales_user_id OR PM.user_id = C.account_user_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.company_id = #{companyId} AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = #{checkupYear}

# CompanyMapper.selectCompanyCm SELECT C.company_id , C.company_code , C.company_name , C.business_no , C.id_placeholder , C.pw_type , C.no_use , C.use_noti_talk , C.ci_filename , C.ci_filename AS org_ci_filename , C.account_user_id , C.sales_user_id , C.admin_user_id , CC.company_checkup_id , CC.checkup_year , CC.employee_number , CC.family_number , CC.checkup_date_begin , CC.checkup_date_end , CC.reserve_date_begin , CC.reserve_date_end , CC.expected_total_support_pay , CC.expected_total_platform_pay , CC.expected_total_etc_pay , CC.sales_manager , CC.assist_manager , CC.notes , CCT.company_checkup_type_id , CCT.company_checkup_type_code , CCT.company_checkup_type_name , CCT.support_pay , CCT.copay , CCT.hospital_pay , CCT.platform_pay , CCT.type_self , CCT.type_family , CCT.type_copay FROM company C
LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON C.company_id = CC.company_id AND CC.checkup_year = #{companyCheckup.checkupYear} LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT company_id , MAX(checkup_year) AS checkup_year FROM company_checkup WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY company_id ) LAST_CC ON C.company_id = LAST_CC.company_id LEFT JOIN company_checkup CC ON LAST_CC.company_id = CC.company_id AND LAST_CC.checkup_year = CC.checkup_year LEFT JOIN company_checkup_type CCT ON CC.company_checkup_id = CCT.company_checkup_id AND CCT.deleted_at IS NULL
LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON PM.user_id = C.admin_user_id OR PM.user_id = C.sales_user_id OR PM.user_id = C.account_user_id WHERE C.deleted_at IS NULL AND C.company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT platform_manager_name , platform_manager_code , user_id FROM platform_manager WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT platform_manager_name AS salesManager , user_id FROM platform_manager WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND sales = 1
SELECT platform_manager_name AS assistManager , user_id FROM platform_manager WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND admin = 1

SELECT company_checkup.company_checkup_id , hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name , hospital_center_view.center_id , reservation.reservation_id , reservation.reservation_state , employee.myself , employee.employee_name , reservation.reservation_name , reservation.employee_checkup_id , company.company_id , company.company_name , employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id , checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id , SUM(CASE WHEN employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_count , SUM(CASE WHEN (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) AND (reservation.reservation_state = 1 OR reservation.reservation_state = 2 OR reservation.reservation_state = 3 OR reservation.reservation_state = 5) AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS apply_count , SUM(CASE WHEN reservation.reservation_state = 4 AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checkuped_count , SUM(CASE WHEN (reservation.reservation_state = 0 OR reservation.reservation_state = null) AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_count FROM checkup_contract LEFT JOIN company_checkup ON checkup_contract.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id AND company_checkup.checkup_year = 2022 AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract.checkup_contract_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_id LEFT JOIN hospital_center_view ON hospital_center_view.hospital_id = checkup_contract.hospital_id AND hospital_center_view.center_id = checkup_contract_type.center_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type ON checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id LEFT JOIN reservation ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = reservation.checkup_contract_sub_type_id AND reservation.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN employee_checkup ON reservation.employee_checkup_id = employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id AND employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id AND employee.myself IS NOT NULL AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE company_checkup.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY checkup_contract_type.center_id ORDER BY hospital_center_view.hospital_center_name

SELECT hospital_center_view.center_id , SUM(CASE WHEN employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_count , SUM(CASE WHEN (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) AND (reservation.reservation_state = 1 OR reservation.reservation_state = 2 OR reservation.reservation_state = 3 OR reservation.reservation_state = 5) AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS apply_count , SUM(CASE WHEN reservation.reservation_state = 4 AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checkuped_count , SUM(CASE WHEN (reservation.reservation_state = 0 OR reservation.reservation_state = NULL) AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_count FROM checkup_contract LEFT JOIN company_checkup ON checkup_contract.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id AND company_checkup.checkup_year = 2022 AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id JOIN employee ON company.company_id = employee.company_id JOIN employee_checkup ON company_checkup.company_checkup_id = employee_checkup.company_checkup_id AND employee.user_id = employee_checkup.user_id LEFT JOIN reservation ON employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id = reservation.employee_checkup_id AND reservation.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_sub_type ON reservation.checkup_contract_sub_type_id = checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_sub_type_id LEFT JOIN checkup_contract_type ON checkup_contract_sub_type.checkup_contract_type_id = checkup_contract_type.checkup_contract_type_id JOIN hospital_center_view ON hospital_center_view.hospital_id = checkup_contract.hospital_id AND hospital_center_view.center_id = checkup_contract_type.center_id WHERE company_checkup.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND company_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY checkup_contract_type.center_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee.user_id) AS total_count , NULL AS apply_count , NULL AS checkuped_count FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND company_checkup.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND company_checkup.checkup_year = 2022 AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 # 전체 인원 UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS total_count , COUNT(DISTINCT employee.user_id) AS apply_count , NULL AS checkuped_count FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN reservation ON employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id = reservation.employee_checkup_id WHERE employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND company_checkup.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND company_checkup.checkup_year = 2022 AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) AND (reservation.reservation_state = 1 OR reservation.reservation_state = 2 OR reservation.reservation_state = 3 OR reservation.reservation_state = 5) AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 # 예약 진행 인원 UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS total_count , NULL AS apply_count , COUNT(DISTINCT employee.user_id) AS checkuped_count FROM employee_checkup JOIN employee ON employee_checkup.user_id = employee.user_id JOIN company_checkup ON employee_checkup.company_checkup_id = company_checkup.company_checkup_id JOIN company ON company_checkup.company_id = company.company_id AND company.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN reservation ON employee_checkup.employee_checkup_id = reservation.employee_checkup_id WHERE employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND company_checkup.company_id = (SELECT company_id FROM company_manager WHERE user_id = #{userId}) AND company_checkup.checkup_year = 2022 AND employee.deleted_at IS NULL AND employee_checkup.deleted_at IS NULL AND (reservation.reservation_state != 0 OR reservation.confirmed_at IS NULL) AND reservation.reservation_state = 4 AND employee_checkup.support_type = 0 # 수검 완료 인원
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO company_checkup_type ( company_checkup_id , company_checkup_type_code , company_checkup_type_name , support_pay , copay , hospital_pay , platform_pay , type_self , type_family , type_copay , created_user_id , updated_user_id) VALUES ( #{companyCheckupId} , #{companyCheckupTypeCode} , #{companyCheckupTypeName} , #{supportPay} , #{copay} , #{hospitalPay} , #{platformPay} , #{typeSelf} , #{typeFamily} , #{typeCopay} , #{sessionUserId} , #{sessionUserId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE company_checkup_type_code = VALUES(company_checkup_type_code) , company_checkup_type_name = VALUES(company_checkup_type_name) , support_pay = VALUES(support_pay) , copay = VALUES(copay) , hospital_pay = VALUES(hospital_pay) , platform_pay = VALUES(platform_pay) , type_self = VALUES(type_self) , type_family = VALUES(type_family) , type_copay = VALUES(type_copay) , created_user_id = VALUES(created_user_id) , updated_at = NOW() , updated_user_id = VALUES(updated_user_id) , deleted_at = NULL , deleted_user_id = NULL
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
